name: Chocolate Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas; cut each crosswise into 10 halves.
2. Insert a stick into each cut end of the banana pieces.
3. Freeze for at least 2 hours.
4. Just before serving, combine the chocolate chips and butter in a small mixing bowl.
5. Gently melt: microwave at 50% (medium) power for 2 to 4 minutes, or until most of the chocolate is shiny and soft; blend well.
6. Dip the frozen bananas into the melted chocolate to coat, or spoon the chocolate over the bananas, allowing excess to drip off.
7. Serve immediately.
8. Wrap any extras in plastic wrap and freeze.
